diagrams.title: Production System Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows the three main components of a production system and their interactions
elements: Production Rules Database (left box) - contains all IF-THEN rules
Working Memory (center box) - blackboard with current facts
Rule Interpreter (right box) - inference engine controlling the cycle
Arrows: WM → Interpreter → Rules → WM showing the循环
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the structure and flow of information in production systems

diagrams.title: Recognition-Action Cycle Flowchart
diagrams.description: The Match-Resolve-Act cycle that the inference engine performs repeatedly
elements: Start → Match all rules against WM → Find applicable rules? → If Yes, resolve conflicts → Select one rule → Execute rule → Update WM → Repeat
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the control flow of the production system interpreter
